scripts.build: expo export --platform web && cp public/_redirects dist/_redirects && cp public/_headers dist/_headers && cp public/manifest.webmanifest dist/manifest.webmanifest && cp public/apple-touch-icon.png dist/apple-touch-icon.png && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp public/icons/icon-192.png public/icons/icon-512.png dist/icons/
scripts.build:web: expo export --platform web && cp public/_redirects dist/_redirects && cp public/_headers dist/_headers && cp public/manifest.webmanifest dist/manifest.webmanifest && cp public/apple-touch-icon.png dist/apple-touch-icon.png && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp public/icons/icon-192.png public/icons/icon-512.png dist/icons/
